'''Glaennor''' was a [[Scout/Legends|scout]] with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and later with [[Bureau of Scouting and Exploration Services|New Republic Scout Service's]] [[Eighth Nebulan Scout Corps]] who was known to occasionally express satisfaction at her income. In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] she and her fellow scout [[Andur Thorsim]] was saved by [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] from [[Oskan blood eater]] released by [[mind-witch]] [[S'ybll]].

{{Char-stub}}
